title: Tense Consistency
content:
# Verbal-Aptitude Revision

*   **Subject-Verb Agreement:** The head noun of the subject determines singular/plural verb form.
*   **Modifier Alignment:** Place the target noun immediately after the modifying phrase to prevent dangling modifiers.
*   **Transitions:** Categorize connectors into contrast (adversative) and result (causal) categories.


*   **Tense Consistency Checklist:** Verify input ranges and clear caches.
